evidence_paragraphs.snippet: While hiding in the [Tumbledown Tower](wiki:Tumbledown_Tower), [Bran](wiki:Bran_Stark) gains the ability to open his third eye at will, and become [Summer](wiki:Summer_(direwolf))....
